response:
Subject: Follow-up: Clarification regarding machine vision sensor details

Dear [Recipient Name],

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response.

I believe there may be a misunderstanding regarding our current machine vision setup. Our device is a FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor on this specific model is the Sony IMX172, not an e2V sensor.

I have attached the relevant technical data to this email for your reference:
*   Please refer to page 18 of the **FL3-U3-Technical-Reference** PDF for the detailed datasheet.
*   For Quantum Efficiency specifications, please see page 13 of the **FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging** PDF.

I will review the files and manuals more carefully and get back to you with further updates.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
